holdings.infoBox: SLX is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are BHP Group stock at 8.55%, Rio Tinto Group at 7.78%, Nucor at 7.66%, Rio Tinto Group at 6.63%, and Vale S.A. at 6.18%.

overview.description: The VanEck Steel ETF (SLX) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MarketVector Global Steel index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies from around the world that earn significant revenues from the steel industry. SLX was launched on Oct 10, 2006 and is issued by VanEck.
